meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid SaaS deployment.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Passive income is built by solving micro-problems for specific niches using automated workflows. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can ship a revenue-generating MVP in under 48 hours. Don't build apps; build assets that solve problems.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. Every day, thousands of founders stall because they are paralyzed by the search for a 'billion-dollar idea' that doesn't exist yet. They are looking for lightning in a bottle, ignoring the steady, consistent rain of micro-SaaS opportunities that generate real, recurring wealth.

True passive income isn't about grand visions; it is about architectural precision. By shifting your focus from 'innovation' to 'utility,' you can escape the cycle of stagnation. This guide provides the blueprint to transform your technical skills into a high-velocity production line, moving you from a dreamer to a ship-first founder.

steps.title: Niche Problem Identification
steps.description: Identify a repetitive manual task in a high-value niche like real estate or legal tech. Use AI to scan forums for 'how do I automate' queries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 100 pain points for freelance accountants and propose 3 micro-SaaS ideas that automate data extraction from PDFs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude search 'pain points for freelance accountants' --output markdown

steps.title: Rapid MVP Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate. Focus on a single core feature that saves at least 2 hours of labor per week for the user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js application with Tailwind CSS and Supabase integration to handle user authentication and file uploads.

steps.title: Implementing the AI Logic
steps.description: Integrate the LLM layer to perform the 'heavy lifting' of your tool. Keep the prompt engineering lean to reduce latency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route that processes an uploaded PDF, extracts invoice data into JSON, and saves it to a Supabase table.

steps.title: Monetization Layer Integration
steps.description: Connect Stripe to your app immediately. Do not build for free; validate your idea by charging for access from Day 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Stripe Checkout for a monthly subscription model, including a webhook handler to update user status in Supabase.

steps.title: Deployment and Feedback Loop
steps.description: Push to production via Vercel and set up automated logging to monitor user interactions and identify friction points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure production deployment settings and add Sentry monitoring to track runtime errors in the invoice processing pipeline.

pro_tips: Always build for 'boring' industries; they have the highest willingness to pay for automation.
Limit your MVP to a single feature that solves one specific, painful bottleneck.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests concurrently with your features to ensure long-term stability.
Don't build your own auth; use Supabase or Clerk to save 20+ hours of development time.
Automate your marketing by building an 'in-app' social share feature that rewards users for referrals.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on cold outreach to your target niche. Your code is the product, but your distribution is the business.
content.conversion_block: You now have the tools and the framework to stop searching and start shipping. The market rewards those who solve problems, not those who wait for inspiration. Stop overthinking the architecture and start building your first revenue stream today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
